jobs.description: We are looking for a zoning assistant at Rauman kaupunki to join our dedicated team of professionals in the planning and world heritage unit. This permanent position offers meaningful work tasks that contribute to the smooth daily life of residents and the overall development of the city, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking a fulfilling career. With a focus on administrative office tasks related to drawing up formulas, such as financial management and case management, this role provides ample opportunities for growth and skill enhancement within a vibrant maritime and cultural setting. Located in Rauma, a bright, maritime and cultural city of approximately 39,000 inhabitants, the team collaborates with over ten people. The unit is part of the technical industry and works closely with two world heritage sites: the sea, an archipelago, and a large harbor. As such, this role requires someone who can effectively manage multiple projects and assist in the interaction procedures related to plan planning. To apply for this position, please submit your application electronically through www.rauma.fi/rekry. For more information or to contact the planning director Juha Eskolin (tel: 044 793 3660, email: juha.eskolin@rauma.fi) or the planning architect Outi Virol

jobs.description: At YES Your Excellent Staff Oy, we are seeking a service-minded and responsible receptionist to join our team for the night shift at Rovaniemi! Ideal candidates will enjoy independent work while providing exceptional customer experiences. Duties include managing hotel receptions, handling check-ins and outs, processing payments, and offering prompt customer service across various scenarios. Night shifts require attention to detail and a proactive approach, as well as assistance with arranging accommodation. This position offers permanent employment in a fast-paced seasonal environment, perfect for developing customer service and organizational skills. The minimum salary is €13.9115/h according to collective agreements, but we are open to discussing your desired compensation. Join us today and start your new career at YES!
what_we_expect: Flexible and customer service-oriented attitude
Good interaction skills and problem solving ability
Ability to work independently and responsibly
Willingness to work night shifts
Fluent Finnish and English language skills, other language skills are considered an advantage
job_responsibilities: Managing the hotel's reception at night
Checking in and out of customers
Processing payment transactions
Customer service in various situations
what_we_offer: Versatile and responsible work in the hotel industry
Permanent employment in a fast-paced seasonal environment
The opportunity to develop your customer service and organizational skills
At least the salary according to the collective agreement for tourism, restaurant and leisure services is €13.9115/h, but we are happy to hear your salary wishes
jobs.search_keywords: night shift, hotel receptionist, Rovaniemi, customer service, independent work, problem solving, language skills, night shifts, job search, hospitality industry

jobs.title: Counterweight forklift operator
jobs.salary_range: The work is done in two shifts, in the morning and in the evening. Overtime is available depending on the situation during the season for those who want it. Work shifts are from 6 a.m. to 2 p.m. and from 2 p.m. to 10 p.m. Salary is according to the trade industry collective agreement (salary group B2: warehouse worker €13.33/h - €15.26/h). The work starts during March and the employment relationship is temporary until the end of October, after which an extension contract or the stabilization of the employment relationship is possible.
jobs.meta_description: Counterweight forklift operator in Helsinki, Vantaa at SOL Logistiikkapalvelut Oy. We are seeking a Counterweight Forklift Operator at SOL
jobs.description: We are seeking a Counterweight Forklift Operator at SOL Logistiikkapalvelut Oy in Helsinki, Vantaa. This role involves operating a forklift to pick up and transport various building materials from an outdoor warehouse. The position offers flexible working hours, including two shifts per day, with the ability to work overtime during peak seasons. A brisk attitude, willingness to work shifts, fluency in Finnish, English, and Swedish, and previous experience using a counterbalance forklift are required. The salary is based on trade industry collective agreement (B2: €13.33/h - €15.26/h), with employment starting in March and ending in October. We offer an Epassi exercise and massage benefit after six months, as well as a supportive work environment that values ​​self-initiative, responsibility, punctuality, competence, professionalism, and diversity.
what_we_expect: Brisk attitude to work in variable weather conditions
Fluent Finnish language skills
Certainty
Willingness to work shifts
job_responsibilities: Picking in an outdoor warehouse using a counterweight forklift
Collection of building materials (long and short lumber, insulation bales, metal pipes, ingots)
Work primarily at the controls of a forklift
what_we_offer: Epassi exercise and massage benefit after 6 months
Salary according to the trade industry collective agreement (salary group B2: warehouse worker €13.33/h - €15.26/h)
We expect the following things from the applicant
jobs.search_keywords: counterweight forklift, outdoor warehouse, building materials, variable weather conditions

jobs.title: Technical assembler - Saxdor Yachts Oy, Larsmo, Bosund
jobs.salary_range: salary commensurate with the task, your work ex
jobs.meta_description: Saxdor Yachts Oy seeks technical assemblers for production facilities in Larsmo, Finland. Ideal candidates have previous experience, read technical drawings...
jobs.description: Saxdor Yachts Oy is seeking technical assemblers for its production facilities in Larsmo, Finland. This role involves assembling boat hulls, decks, and other structures while following detailed drawings and work instructions. The ideal candidate should have previous experience in technical assembly or industrial production, be able to read and follow technical drawings, exhibit accuracy, care, and a responsible approach to work, and possess teamwork and cooperation skills. Physical endurance is also essential for this role. Saxdor Yachts offers a comprehensive introduction to work tasks, modern facilities, professional support, competitive pay based on the customer's terms of engagement, opportunities for career development, occupational health services at Terveystalo, help with language and employment skills, and an easy application process through Bolt.Works. The company also provides excellent working conditions and a fair employer atmosphere. Apply quickly to join this dynamic team in Larsmo, Finland.
what_we_expect: Previous experience in technical assembly, preferably in boat or industrial production
Ability to read and follow technical drawings and work instructions
Accuracy, care and responsible approach to work
Teamwork and cooperation skills
Physical endurance and a desire to do manual work
job_responsibilities: Assembly of boat hulls, decks and other structures
Installing the components according to the drawings and work instructions
Connecting composite and metal parts to each other
Basic installations of electrical and mechanical systems in cooperation with the electrical and motor team
Installation of boat engines and transmission systems
Making wiring and connections to motor systems
what_we_offer: A comprehensive introduction to work tasks and a modern work environment
The support of a team of professionals and the opportunity to develop into a top expert in the field
Pay according to the customer's TES
The possibility of a bonus for a job well done
Occupational health services at Terveystalo right from the first day of work
Help with professional and language skills and advice on employment matters
jobs.search_keywords: technical assembler Saxdor Yachts Oy Larsmo Bosund

jobs.description: We are looking for a responsible and efficient local caretaker to join our team in Mariehamn! We have an immediate opening for full-time employment. Our ideal candidate possesses excellent organizational skills, work experience, and a strong sense of duty. They must be able to handle chemical cleaners, clean the toilets, maintain cleaning equipment, and perform outdoor tasks. Our benefits include quality, trust, and knowledge-driven operations. If you're interested in working with a small business that values engagement and motivation, send your application today to Katarina at info@fint.ax. The job involves 24/7 duties, including weekends and evenings. Fint på Åland is a growing company founded in 2011 with operations in Mariehamn.

jobs.description: Veskun Grilli Oy is seeking an experienced chef/restaurant worker for their busy establishment in Kuopio. This versatile position offers the opportunity to work independently during long sick leave or secure permanent employment after that period. The ideal candidate should have experience in lunch preparation, pizza, and burger departments. Located in the heart of Maaninga, Veskun Grilli specializes in a variety of grilled dishes, burgers, and pizzas served both on weekdays and for catering services. With an emphasis on food quality and cleanliness, this position requires attention to detail and the ability to manage operations effectively. Email veskungrilli@luukku.com for more information or apply directly at www.veskun-grilli.fi.

Possibility of permanent employment after the sick leave
